programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Schlocky disaster flick starring Paul Johansson. When tornadoes start tossing boulders at Boston, a storm chaser must stop the ensuing chaos using his untested theory on weather manipulation (2013).
Mannering and Cordelia investigate a neo-Nazi organization who are selling off art treasures to fund their evil plans to gain dominance in Europe. Stopping them will prove to be a challenge.
Steed believes he has finally cracked a case when he captures his nemesis. But when things go awry, the team and a member of the royal family suddenly find themselves in grave danger .
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Western with Jeff Fahey. In Australia's untamed outback, a woman will stop at nothing to save her family's ranch, while two rival suitors will risk everything to win her heart... (1989)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Mid-air action with Tia Carrere. After a freak solar flare kills the pilot and disables the systems on board, a passenger and a flight attendant must take the controls and find a safe landing. (2012)

Spy thriller with Michael Caine and Jason Connery. No one can be trusted as former agent Harry Palmer comes up against the Russian mafia whilst on a mission to recover stolen plutonium (1996).

Western starring James Garner and Dennis Weaver. Gold fever breaks out in the Old West as outlaw Luther Sledge and his gang set their sights on a pile of loot stored behind bars... (1970)

Western starring James Garner and Dennis Weaver. Gold fever breaks out in the Old West as outlaw Luther Sledge and his gang set their sights on a pile of loot stored behind bars... (1970)
A reporter comes from New York to Tombstone to write a story about the town too tough to die.
Hollister tracks a man who murdered an old miner and stole the man's gold.
Victoria and Mano's grief is compounded when they learn their late father left his estate to a surprise heir.
The team are tasked with investigating the whereabouts of a stolen rocket from a munitions warehouse. Meanwhile, Purdey experiences a tense encounter with her ex-boyfriend .
The Avengers find themselves in danger when they are targeted by a relative of one of their past adversaries. Can Peel and Steed outwit the mastermind determined to exact their revenge?
When Mannering discovers the Russian icons he had sold in good faith to a gallery have been replaced by fakes, he must play the thief at his own game at a rigged poker table to recover them.
Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her (2018).

Action with Mark Lutz. When an asteroid threatens to obliterate Earth, a discredited astrophysicist is humanity's last hope. Armed with cutting-edge tech, can he prevent a global disaster (2015)?

Spy thriller starring Michael Caine and Jason Connery. Retired agent Harry Palmer returns to his high stakes day job to prevent North Korea getting its hands on a deadly biological weapon (1995).

Western with James Craig. A former gunslinger tries to restore order to a lawless town, but is foiled by the efforts of an evil saloon owner whose infirmity grants him immunity from violence. (1960)

With an increase in the murders of miners, Hollister has to find those responsible with a stolen black diamond holding a clue.
A young man seeks the Sheriff's help after being accused of a gold robbery.
Attacks plague the Montoya property after Don Domingo announces plans to sell .
Steed and the team find themselves in danger as a prolific criminal looks to exact their revenge on them .
Steed and Peel find themselves involved in a deadly car race that has a 'shocking' surprise at the finish line. Can they hunt down a murderer and locate stolen top-secret papers?
Investigating the disappearance of a client and friend, Mannering uncovers a bizarre sect intent on defrauding its hapless followers and he is top of their hit list for assassination.
A group of soldiers fight to survive when faced with a deadly battle at the Guadacanal. Starring John Travolta, Jim Cavieze, Adrien Brody, Sean Penn, Woody Harrelson, John Cusack. (1998)
